/usr/bin/ar qc libdram.a CMakeFiles/dram.dir/pimkernel/pim_kernel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/pimkernel/Read.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/pimkernel/Write.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/pimkernel/GEMV.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/dram_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/dram_request.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/pim_request.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/memory_object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/mmap_controller.cpp.o ramulator2/src/base/CMakeFiles/ramulator-base.dir/factory.cpp.o ramulator2/src/base/CMakeFiles/ramulator-base.dir/logging.cpp.o ramulator2/src/base/CMakeFiles/ramulator-base.dir/utils.cpp.o ramulator2/src/base/CMakeFiles/ramulator-base.dir/config.cpp.o ramulator2/src/base/CMakeFiles/ramulator-base.dir/stats.cpp.o ramulator2/src/base/CMakeFiles/ramulator-base.dir/request.cpp.o ramulator2/src/frontend/CMakeFiles/ramulator-frontend.dir/impl/memory_trace/loadstore_trace.cpp.o ramulator2/src/frontend/CMakeFiles/ramulator-frontend.dir/impl/memory_trace/readwrite_trace.cpp.o ramulator2/src/frontend/CMakeFiles/ramulator-frontend.dir/impl/processor/simpleO3/simpleO3.cpp.o ramulator2/src/frontend/CMakeFiles/ramulator-frontend.dir/impl/processor/simpleO3/core.cpp.o ramulator2/src/frontend/CMakeFiles/ramulator-frontend.dir/impl/PIM_controller.cpp.o ramulator2/src/frontend/CMakeFiles/ramulator-frontend.dir/impl/external_wrapper/gem5_frontend.cpp.o ramulator2/src/translation/CMakeFiles/ramulator-translation.dir/impl/no_translation.cpp.o ramulator2/src/translation/CMakeFiles/ramulator-translation.dir/impl/random_translation.cpp.o ramulator2/src/memory_system/CMakeFiles/ramulator-memorysystem.dir/impl/dummy_memory_system.cpp.o ramulator2/src/memory_system/CMakeFiles/ramulator-memorysystem.dir/impl/generic_DRAM_system.cpp.o ramulator2/src/memory_system/CMakeFiles/ramulator-memorysystem.dir/impl/PIM_DRAM_system.cpp.o ramulator2/src/addr_mapper/CMakeFiles/ramulator-addrmapper.dir/impl/linear_mappers.cpp.o ramulator2/src/addr_mapper/CMakeFiles/ramulator-addrmapper.dir/impl/rit.cpp.o ramulator2/src/dram/CMakeFiles/ramulator-dram.dir/impl/DDR3.cpp.o ramulator2/src/dram/CMakeFiles/ramulator-dram.dir/impl/DDR5.cpp.o ramulator2/src/dram/CMakeFiles/ramulator-dram.dir/impl/LPDDR5.cpp.o ramulator2/src/dram/CMakeFiles/ramulator-dram.dir/impl/HBM.cpp.o ramulator2/src/dram/CMakeFiles/ramulator-dram.dir/impl/HBM2.cpp.o ramulator2/src/dram/CMakeFiles/ramulator-dram.dir/impl/HBM3.cpp.o ramulator2/src/dram_controller/CMakeFiles/ramulator-controller.dir/impl/dummy_controller.cpp.o ramulator2/src/dram_controller/CMakeFiles/ramulator-controller.dir/impl/generic_dram_controller.cpp.o /usr/bin/ranlib libdram.a
